title: Symmetric blind information reconciliation for the QKD post-processing procedure
author: E.O. Kiktenko
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We suggest an improvement of blind information reconciliation with LDPC codes. The proposed technique allows one to overcome challenges of using the discussed methods by providing guaranteed syndrome decoding with decreased information leakage and decreased number of communication rounds compared with the standard blind information reconciliation.
steps_raw: We suggest an improvement of blind information reconciliation with LDPC codes. The proposed technique allows one to overcome challenges of using the discussed methods by providing guaranteed syndrome decoding with decreased information leakage and decreased number of communication rounds compared with the standard blind information reconciliation.
keywords: quantum key distribution, information reconciliation, LDPC, rate-adaptive, blind reconciliation
